summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Dwianto Capital Advisory static website. All 6 main pages and 6 blog article pages render correctly with consistent navigation and footer. Language switching (EN, AR, ZH, ES) works correctly with localStorage persistence. RTL layout for Arabic is properly applied. Contact form with Formspree integration displays correctly with client-side validation. Mobile responsive navigation toggle works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. This is a pure static HTML/CSS/JS website served via http-server. Language switching uses Vanilla JS with localStorage persistence. Contact form is configured with Formspree (https://formspree.io/f/xbljgvgw) - actual submission will work once email is verified on Formspree.

homepage_test.details: Homepage loads correctly with navigation, hero carousel (3 slides), stats bar, services preview, portfolio preview, insights preview, and footer.

navigation_test.details: All 6 navigation links present and working: Home, About, Services, Portfolio, Insights, Contact. Active link highlighting works correctly.

hero_carousel_test.details: Hero carousel has 3 slides with prev/next buttons and dot indicators. Carousel navigation works correctly.

language_switcher_test.details: Language dropdown shows 4 options: English, Arabic (العربية), Chinese (中文), Spanish (Español). All languages switch correctly.

arabic_rtl_test.details: Arabic language switch correctly applies RTL direction (dir='rtl') and translates navigation links to Arabic.

language_persistence_test.details: Language preference persists in localStorage under key 'dcaLang'.

chinese_translation_test.details: Chinese translation works correctly. Navigation shows: 首页, 关于我们, 服务, 投资组合, 洞察, 联系我们

spanish_translation_test.details: Spanish translation works correctly. Navigation shows: Inicio, Nosotros, Servicios, Portafolio, Perspectivas, Contacto

about_page_test.details: About page loads correctly with page hero, content sections, and footer. About link marked as active.

services_page_test.details: Services page loads correctly with page hero, service sections, and footer. Services link marked as active.

credibility_page_test.details: Credibility/Portfolio page loads correctly with page hero, stats bar, 6 portfolio cards, and footer.

insights_page_test.details: Insights page loads correctly with page hero, filter bar (5 filter pills), search box, 6 blog cards, and footer. Filter functionality works.

blog_article_test.details: Blog article pages load correctly with article hero, breadcrumb navigation, article body, sidebar, related articles section, and footer. All 6 blog articles return HTTP 200.

contact_page_test.details: Contact page loads correctly with page hero, contact form (Formspree integration), contact info items, and footer.

contact_form_validation_test.details: Contact form validation works. Shows 'Please fill in all required fields.' error when submitting empty form. All form fields (name, email, phone, company, service dropdown, message) are present and fillable.

mobile_responsive_test.details: Mobile navigation toggle visible at 390px width. Mobile menu opens on toggle click with 6 nav links and 4 language buttons.

mobile_language_switch_test.details: Mobile language switching works correctly. Arabic switch applies RTL direction on mobile.

article_language_switch_test.details: Language switching works correctly on blog article pages. Navigation translates to selected language.

features_verified: All 6 blog article pages render correctly with consistent nav/footer
Navigation links work correctly across all pages
Language switching works - English, Arabic (RTL), Chinese, Spanish
Contact form displays correctly with Formspree integration
Footer displays correctly with contact information
Hero carousel on homepage cycles through slides
